name: Nomic v1.5 Fine-tuned (Key-Value Format)
description: Evaluation of nomic-embed-text-v1.5 fine-tuned on domain triplets with key-value serialization. Identical to experiment 003 except serialization format. Tests hypothesis H3/H4: pipe vs KV format.
notes: Paired comparison with exp 003. Same model, same training config, different serialization. Key test of serialization format hypothesis.
